team_name: Smart Tender Evaluation System (STES) using New Emerging Technology
summary: Design a technical platform, Smart Tender Evaluation System (STES), for AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement using document parsing, large language model (LLM)-based information extraction, rule-based matching, and a human-in-the-loop verification layer.
key_steps: extraction of eligibility criteria from tender documents
evaluation of each bidder's submission against those criteria
optimization_claims: reduces evaluation time from days to hours
provides an audit trail that can withstand scrutiny
